title: LimZ Method, Spel Class
parameters: ZLimit	A coordinate value within the movable range of the Z axis.
description: Sets the default value of the Z axis height for JUMP commands.
see_also:
Jump

LimZ Example

VB Example:

saveLimZ = m_spel.GetLimZ()

m_spel.LimZ = -22

C# Example:

saveLimZ = m_spel.GetLimZ();

m_spel.LimZ(-22);
